title: Update preact-compat to version 3.4.2 🚀
body:
Hello lovely humans, [preact-compat](https://www.npmjs.com/package/preact-compat) just published its new version 3.4.2.
State Update :rocket:
Dependency preact-compat
New version 3.4.2
Type devDependency
This version is **not covered** by your **current version range**. Without accepting this pull request your project will work just like it did before. There might be a bunch of new features, fixes and perf improvements that the maintainers worked on for you though. I recommend you look into these changes and try to get onto the latest version of preact-compat. Given that you have a decent test suite, a passing build is a strong indicator that you can take advantage of these changes by merging the proposed change into your project. Otherwise this branch is a great starting point for you to work on the update. Do you have any ideas how I could improve these pull requests? Did I report anything you think isn’t right? Are you unsure about how things are supposed to work? There is a collection of [frequently asked questions](https://greenkeeper.io/faq.html) and while I’m just a bot, there is a group of people who are happy to teach me new things. [Let them know](https://github.com/greenkeeperio/greenkeeper/issues/new). Good luck with your project :sparkles: You rock! :palm_tree: --- The new version differs by 22 commits . - [`3fad584`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/3fad58413b35babb787673e654d22a805e5b4207) 3.4.2 - [`f9f2f3c`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/f9f2f3c10211e3bdad159f274388ca727b6f3028) avoid double-correcting props.children if its already a non-array - [`09a7986`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/09a79863f2c65c6d4a01a0df814ae7fc6170ee54) 3.4.1 - [`272a82c`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/272a82cf0bb4d51fa6e28d2f4ab5e05f027d8e06) Fix possible case where props.children could still be an Array - [`0dd94a0`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/0dd94a01ffddf2ce35d3d0c42156faba89641462) 3.4.0 - [`6ba4e78`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/6ba4e78d9243bb3efce40f5ccd550373cbcc392f) Add ReactTransitionGroup alias. Fixes #186 - [`9d73a84`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/9d73a8406c1991e81ad1f449f1de2f813dad68d5) Apply `defaultProps` for components created in compat mode. Fixes #146. - [`c0755e7`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/c0755e70f33df28f195d947aee329df58bbbccd3) Fix `jsnext:main` issue in `/server` and `/legacy` entry points. - [`b30de9c`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/b30de9c282cc6713af50f716f440e0cbebc9a94a) 3.3.0 - [`7b0d9d4`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/7b0d9d44a92809174d99dd83980ea199254be37d) Add /legacy entry - [`ac5f4ce`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/ac5f4ce59bb68601ab14c3cbd062beb8c5ac61e4) fix accidental node 6+ dev requirement - [`be4648e`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/be4648e890560b28e4689e5fc40156dd0d5926c8) 3.2.0 - [`55e8c8b`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/55e8c8b4de11b64cf32b48c220b0362d11b06ed7) Tests & fix for ReactFragment lib - [`d56247d`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/d56247d0970d7597b9a2da2f3ae88bf791a22d84) Add ReactFragment /cc @devgeeks - [`0ca639a`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/0ca639aab4359c118305a16e4410c103617fa712) 3.1.0 There are 22 commits in total. See the [full diff](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/compare/9bf4edfaa2828a6810e47b94064dc1719762c63d...3fad58413b35babb787673e654d22a805e5b4207). --- This pull request was created by [greenkeeper.io](https://greenkeeper.io/).
